title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!
